message.content:
# GLearn Dashboard UI Detailed Description

## Overall Layout Structure
The interface is a comprehensive educational management dashboard with a left sidebar navigation, main content area, and right sidebar. The layout follows a clean, modern design with a light color scheme and ample white space. The dashboard is structured as a single-page application with multiple data visualization components.

## Color Scheme
- Primary brand color: `#10B981` (teal/green)
- Secondary brand color: `#F59E0B` (amber/yellow)
- Background: `#F9FAFB` (light gray)
- Card backgrounds: `#FFFFFF` (white)
- Text colors: `#111827` (dark gray), `#6B7280` (medium gray), `#9CA3AF` (light gray)
- Success indicators: `#10B981` (green)
- Warning indicators: `#F59E0B` (amber)
- Danger indicators: `#EF4444` (red)

## Header Section
- **Top navigation bar** with white background
- **GLearn logo** on the left with teal circle background and white text
- **Search icon** (magnifying glass) next to the logo
- **Notification bell icon** on the right
- **User profile section** with "Admin User" text and "Super Admin" subtitle
- **User avatar** (circular) on the far right

## Left Sidebar Navigation
- **White background** with teal accent color
- **Navigation items** (all with icons):
  - Overview (currently selected, teal background)
  - Students
  - Teachers
  - Attendance
  - Transport
  - Fees
  - Classes
  - Timetable
  - Exams
  - Reports
  - Settings
- Each item has a corresponding icon and text label
- Selected item has a teal background and white text

## Main Content Area
### Welcome Section
- **Header**: "Welcome back! Here's what's happening today"
- **Tab navigation** with 5 tabs: Students, Teachers, Attendance, Transport, Classes, Finance
- **Students tab** is currently active (teal underline)

### Statistics Cards (Grid of 6)
Each card has:
- **Icon** in a colored circle
- **Number** in large font
- **Label** in smaller font
- **Green status indicator** (circle) on the right

1. **Total Students**
   - Icon: User silhouette
   - Number: 2,458
   - Color: Teal circle

2. **Present Today**
   - Icon: Checkmark
   - Number: 2,234
   - Color: Teal circle

3. **Absent Today**
   - Icon: X mark
   - Number: 224
   - Color: Red circle

4. **Bus Trips Today**
   - Icon: Bus
   - Number: 1,842
   - Color: Teal circle

5. **Fees Collected Today**
   - Icon: Dollar sign
   - Number: $24,890
   - Color: Teal circle

6. **Pending Invoices**
   - Icon: Document
   - Number: 156
   - Color: Teal circle

### Charts Section
- **Two chart cards** side by side
- **Weekly Attendance** (left)
  - Bar chart with teal bars
  - X-axis: Days of week (Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri)
  - Y-axis: Attendance numbers
  - Hover tooltip: "Mon present: 2100, absent: 200"
  - Chart title: "Weekly Attendance"

- **Monthly Fees Revenue** (right)
  - Line chart with yellow line
  - X-axis: Months (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun)
  - Y-axis: Revenue amounts
  - Chart title: "Monthly Fees Revenue"

### Bottom Cards
- **Bus Tracking** (left)
  - Teal background
  - Title: "Bus Tracking"
  - Subtitle: "Real-time monitoring"
  - Bus icon
  - Two buttons: "Live Buses" and "Schedule Today"

- **Upcoming Events** (right)
  - White background
  - Title: "Upcoming Events"
  - "View All" link (teal)
  - Event item:
    - Teal circle with "1"
    - "Annual Sports Day"
    - Date: "Nov 25, 2023"
    - "Event" tag

## Right Sidebar
### Calendar Widget
- **November, 1 Thursday** header
- **Calendar grid** with dates 1-30
- **Current date** highlighted (teal background)
- **Special dates** marked with colored dots (yellow, orange, red)

### Today's Schedule
- **Section title**: "Today's Schedule"
- **Schedule items** (each with time, title, and status indicator):
  1. **Award Show Discussion**
     - Time: 10:00 AM - 11:00 AM
     - Teal status indicator
  2. **New Branding with Ace**
     - Time: 11:00 AM - 12:30 PM
     - Yellow status indicator
  3. **Development Discussion**
     - Time: 02:00 PM - 03:30 PM
     - Orange status indicator
  4. **Parent-Teacher Meeting**
     - Time: 04:00 PM - 05:00 PM
     - Teal status indicator

## Typography
- **Headings**: Sans-serif, bold, varying sizes
- **Body text**: Sans-serif, regular weight
- **Numbers**: Larger font size, bold
- **Labels**: Smaller font size, regular weight

## UI Elements
- **Buttons**: Rounded corners, teal background for primary actions
- **Cards**: White background with subtle shadow, rounded corners
- **Status indicators**: Colored circles (green, yellow, orange, red)
- **Icons**: Consistent style throughout ( Feather icons or similar)
- **Spacing**: Generous padding and margins between elements
- **Borders**: Subtle borders around cards and sections
- **Shadows**: Light shadows on cards for depth
- **Input fields**: Not visible in this view
- **Badges**: Colored circles with numbers
- **Pagination**: Not visible in this view
- **Tables**: Not visible in this view

## Additional Details
- **Responsive design** considerations (though full responsiveness not visible)
- **Consistent spacing** throughout (approximately 1rem between elements)
- **Visual hierarchy** clearly established with size and color
- **Data visualization** emphasized with charts and graphs
- **Real-time monitoring** indicated in Bus Tracking section
- **Event management** with schedule and calendar views

The interface provides a comprehensive overview of school operations with quick access to key metrics, attendance tracking, financial data, and scheduling information. The design emphasizes clarity and ease of use for administrative tasks.
